heading: Implementation of water resources principles and requirements
label: 1962–4 Implementation of water resources principles and requirements
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as a part of the Water Resources Development Act of 2020, and not as a part of the Water Resources Planning Act which comprises this chapter.
“Secretary” DefinedSecretary means the Secretary of the Army, see , set out as a note under , Navigation and Navigable Waters.section 2 of div. AA of Pub. L. 116–260section 2201 of Title 33

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Not later than 180 days after , the Secretary shall issue final agency-specific procedures necessary to implement the principles and requirements and the interagency guidelines.December 27, 2020

children.heading: Development of future water resources development projects
children.label: b Development of future water resources development projects
A
children.text: the guiding principles established by the principles and requirements; and

children.label: B
children.text: the national water resources planning policy established by ; andsection 1962–3(a) of this title
fully identifies and analyzes national economic development benefits, regional economic development benefits, environmental quality benefits, and other societal effects.

children.heading: Review and update
children.label: c Review and update
children.text: Every 5 years, the Secretary shall review and, where appropriate, revise the procedures required by subsection (a).

children.heading: Public review, notice, and comment
children.label: d Public review, notice, and comment

children.text: provide notice to interested non-Federal stakeholders of the Secretary’s intent to revise the procedures;
provide opportunities for interested non-Federal stakeholders to engage with, and provide input and recommendations to, the Secretary on the revision of the procedures; and
solicit and consider public and expert comments.

children.heading: Interagency guidelines
children.label: 1 Interagency guidelines
children.text: The term “interagency guidelines” means the interagency guidelines contained in the document finalized by the Council on Environmental Quality pursuant to in December 2014, to implement the principles and requirements.section 1962–3 of this title

children.heading: Principles and requirements
children.label: 2 Principles and requirements
children.text: The term “principles and requirements” means the principles and requirements contained in the document prepared by the Council on Environmental Quality pursuant to , entitled “Principles and Requirements for Federal Investments in Water Resources”, and dated March 2013.section 1962–3 of this title
